3018590.name: Bug Alliance Demo
3018590.description:
ENTER THE SWARM

Bug Alliance is a top-down Action Roguelite where every run is a new experiment—and every level-up is a real decision. Fight through escalating waves, shape your build through upgrades and Synergies, and earn your progress across a story-driven campaign that rewards mastery.

THE STORY

Earth didn’t just fall—it turned desperate. As forests vanished and survival collapsed, humans engineered bugs to last longer… then escalated into cruelty: breeding, reshaping, and enslaving entire species as food, tools, and weapons.

The swarms mutated, fought back, and forced humanity from the planet—yet not all of them died. A remnant fled, watching from afar. In the silence that followed, three Queens rose to unite the surface and form Volucris—while far beneath, the leftovers of human experiments continued to evolve into something far worse.

KEY FEATURES:

  • Top-down Action Roguelite built around wave survival and buildcraft

  • Epic bug characters with unique abilities and weapons

  • 20-wave maps with boss finales

  • 13-map story campaign revealed through higher difficulty clears

  • Deep build creation via upgrades, Tactical Gear, glyphs, and Synergies

  • Chaos Surge endless mode with bosses, curse choices, merchants, and risky rewards

  • Persistent progression: ranks, unlockable bugs, skins, challenges, tasks, and lore

CHOOSE YOUR BUG. DEFINE YOUR PLAYSTYLE

Play as a growing roster of bug warriors—each built around a distinct combat identity.

  • Every bug has 2 weapons and 4 abilities

  • Before a run, choose 1 weapon and 1 ability to level up during the match

  • During gameplay, you may gain one additional random ability, opening new combos

  • Start with Pruver - a genius engineer, then unlock more bugs by completing specific conditions

Each character supports multiple build paths—from raw damage and critical bursts to sustain, defense, and control—depending on how you upgrade.

ONSLAUGHT: THE CORE MODE

Onslaught is the heart of Bug Alliance—a focused, replayable wave experience.

  • 20 waves per map

  • A climactic boss fight at Wave 20

  • Defeat the boss to complete the map and progress to tougher challenges

STORY PROGRESSION

Bug Alliance’s campaign is structured as Prologue + 13 Chapters, delivered through 13 maps—and the story is earned through mastery.

  • Clear a map on Normal to unlock Hard

  • Beat that map on Hard to reveal its story chapter

  • Hard difficulty also introduces quick quests, such as defending objectives or hunting elite enemies

  • Clear Hard to unlock Extreme

  • Extreme adds additional threats, including environmental events like tornadoes, meteor showers, and more

Complete Extreme to unlock that map’s endless variant…

CHAOS SURGE: ENDLESS RUNS, CURSES, AND HIGH-RISK REWARDS

Chaos Surge is an endless mode where the game keeps raising the stakes.

  • A Chaos Level rises as you kill enemies

  • When it fills, a boss appears

  • Defeat the boss to choose one of 3 Curse Cards

    • Curses are negative modifiers that reshape your run and escalate difficulty

  • A Merchant appears at key milestones

    • Spend Teeth dropped by enemies to buy power-ups, healing, and other run-saving tools

The longer you survive, the more your build is tested—and the more legendary it becomes.

LEVEL-UP CARDS: YOUR BUILD IS YOUR POWER

Every run is shaped by choices.

When you level up:

  • 4 random upgrade cards appear

  • Pick one to strengthen your build

Upgrades can enhance:

  • Weapons

  • Abilities

  • Tactical Gear

  • Glyphs (HP, shield, armor, crit, and more)

Each item has a max level, so committing to one path means sacrificing another—making every run feel personal and strategic.

SYNERGIES: THE MOMENT YOUR BUILD “CLICKS”

Push your gear to its peak and unlock Synergies—powerful transformations that change how your weapons and abilities behave.

  • 2 Synergy paths for every weapon and ability

  • Each path supports a different playstyle

  • Synergies turn strong builds into signature builds

With the number of combinations across upgrades, stats, tactical gear, and Synergies, every character supports thousands of viable build possibilities.

PROGRESSION, UNLOCKS, AND REPLAY GOALS

Bug Alliance rewards every run—win or lose.

  • Reveal 13-chapter breathtaking story of Bug Alliance

  • Weapons, abilities, and characters gain Rank the more you play

  • Ranking up improves performance and unlocks skins

  • Unlock additional bug characters by meeting gameplay conditions

  • Complete Challenges (achievement-style goals) and Tasks (extra objectives during runs) for more rewards and long-term goals

THE LORE BOOK

Unlock the world behind the war.

  • Reveal campaign story chapters by clearing maps on Hard

  • Unlock character lore entries by meeting their unique conditions

and more to be decided together with our great community
